    min_path = [float('inf')]*k
    min_path_index = [-1]*k
    path = []

    def dfs(i, j, k):
        nonlocal min_path, min_path_index, path
        if k == 0:
            if len(path) == k and sum(path) < min_path[0]:
                min_path = [sum(path)]
                min_path_index = [path[:]]
            elif len(path) == k and sum(path) == min_path[0]:
                min_path_index[k-1].append(path[:])
            return
        for x, y in [(i-1, j), (i+1, j), (i, j-1), (i, j+1)]:
            if 0 <= x < n and 0 <= y < n and not visited[x][y]:
                visited[x][y] = True
                path.append(grid[x][y])
                dfs(x, y, k-1)
                path.pop()
                visited[x][y] = False

    for i in range(n):
        for j in range(n):
            visited[i][j] = True
            path.append(grid[i][j])
            dfs(i, j, k-1)
            path.pop()
            visited[i][j] = False

    return min_path_index[0]

n = len(grid)
    visited = [[False]*n for _ in range(n)]
    min_path = [float('inf')]*k
    min_path_index = [-1]*k
    path = []

    def dfs(i, j, k):
        nonlocal min_path, min_path_index, path
        if k == 0:
            if len(path) > 0:
                min_path[len(path)-1] = min(min_path[len(path)-1], sum(path))
                min_path_index[len(path)-1] = len(path) - 1
            return
        if i < 0 or j < 0 or i >= n or j >= n or visited[i][j]:
            return
        visited[i][j] = True
        path.append(grid[i][j])
        dfs(i-1, j, k-1)
        path.pop()
        visited[i][j] = False
        dfs(i+1, j, k-1)
        path.pop()
        dfs(i, j-1, k-1)
        path.pop()
        dfs(i, j+1, k-1)
        visited[i][j] = False

    for i in range(n):
        for j in range(n):
            visited[i][j] = True
            dfs(i, j, k-1)
            visited[i][j] = False

    return path[min_path_index[0]]
